title: dyschoriste serpyllifolia
intro: Dyschoriste serpyllifolia, also known as the false thyme or the serpent's tongue, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dyschoriste serpyllifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
